basics.name: Luis Gadiel Mondragón Sanchez
basics.label: Information and Communications Technology Engineer
basics.summary: 5 years of experience as an IT Engineer. Most recently a Senior Software Engineer at Rassini. Being in charge of the software architecture, design, development and implementation of information systems for Rassini Brakes located in Flint, Michigan, USA, has allowed me to gain valuable experience in project management, people management, leadership and software development. Skilled in problem-solving and practical solution implementation. I enjoy learning new technical things of all sorts. React, JavaScript, Kendo UI, Node JS, REST API, SQL, OpenEdge 4gl, Progress DataBases, and QAD-ERP management are my core software languages/skills.

work.name: Rassini Brakes, Michigan, USA
work.summary: Developed and implemented the IMS (Inventory Management System) for Rassini Brakes in Flint, Michigan, USA, which increased the efficiency of inventory management, deleted manual and repetitive proceses by 90%, real-time data monitoring using control panels, web responsive design using React, Kendo UI, Apache Echarts, Node JS and Progress Openedge 4GL, REST API and CIM loads to report directly to QAD-ERP in line production, downtimes, scrap, shippers control and inventory management. Constantly collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure the software solutions meet the needs of the business and end-users. Additionally, I have been responsible for mentoring junior developers and leading the software development team in the absence of a software manager.

work.name: Rassini Frenos, Puebla, MX
work.summary: Debugging, development, and monitoring of financial solutions such as reports, automatic uploads (CIM Interfaces), and browsers with the corresponding areas. Creation and implementation of modules and submodules for supplier payments in Rassini's Suppliers Portal. Tickets resolutions of software issues, incidents, and troubleshooting to QAD and Rassini information systems. Analysis, development, implementation, and training of software and systems for controlling foundry, machining and painting processes using React, JavaScript, REST API, OpenEdge 4GL, Progress Databases and QAD management.

work.name: Audi México, San José Chiapa, MX
work.summary: Creation and implementation of a web application to manage follow-up request analysis of Audi Q5 vehicles in production processes USING Oracle Apex and PL/SQL, system that allowed me to develop administration dashboards using Tableau with direct connection to the database. System that generated a 50% reduction in the time spent on follow-up request analysis and improved the efficiency of the process. Additionally, I was responsible for providing training and support to end-users of the system.

education.institution: Instituto Tecnológico del Altiplano de Tlaxcala

projects.name: Italian Coffee Redesign
projects.description: A project to renew the web page of Italian coffee including a new design focused on the menu section for better user experience and new features.
